candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit D&A row is for SG&A, not COGS/cost of revenues. No separate depreciation/amortisation row tied to Cost of Revenues - Total appears above the financial section, so COGS D&A is presumed embedded in the selected COGS row.

variables.notes: No separate operating D&A row for COGS/cost of revenues is visible in the excerpt. Avoid adding SG&A depreciation to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit SG&A depreciation row shown separately at the same operating-section level as the selected XSGA component rows (Central administration, Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses, Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - other). Because it is presented separately rather than as an apparent subcomponent nested within one selected parent total, it should be added separately to the XSGA bucket. No separate R&D row is selected in XRD, so no R&D-related exclusion applies.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A depreciation row as separate D&A to add later. No summary-vs-component conflict is visible.
